top_signals.title: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin price forecasts diverge as US-Iran war tensions fueled an ongoing oil and bond-market surge, while July Fed rate-hike odds neared 40%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Heathrow boss warns Burnham against Budget raid after hub’s tax bill doubles
top_signals.summary: The boss of Heathrow has warned Andy Burnham against using business as a cash cow at his maiden Budget this autumn, after the airport’s tax bill more than doubled in the space of a year. Thomas Woldbye said the aviation sector is one of the most heavily taxed industries in Britain, and that uptick in [...]

top_signals.title: Wellington Is Passing on Data-Center Debt Deals on Property Value Concerns
top_signals.summary: Data-center debt risks are rising, there’s uncertainty over what the properties are worth and returns are falling, according to Wellington Management.

top_signals.title: South Korean, U.S. Shipbuilders Deepen Ties
top_signals.summary: The quest to rebuild U.S. shipbuilding capability quickly is premised on partnering with existing shipbuilding powers outside of China, with several recent announcements today solidifying the connection between the two allies.Three separate partnerships were recently announced…
